metadata.description: Project management plugins for Claude Code

plugins.name: csitrep-generator
plugins.description: Multi-agent Situation Report (SitRep) generator for any project type. Supports construction, software, development programs, product/manufacturing, consulting, and custom projects.

plugins.name: mmpm-cognitive-os
plugins.description: Constitutional multi-agent decision architecture for major programme governance. 16 agents across 4 layers (Chair, Domain, Coupling, Adversarial) grounded in Oxford MMPM doctrine.
